title: Dreams about Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Dreams about Evangelion...             Quote Post by Phaze » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:16 pm So has anyone here ever had a dream about Eva? I've had three so far, one of which I can't recall. In one I worked for the german branch of NERV and was part of a group performing startup tests on unit-02. In the other I am able to remember, I was in a setting similar to where Shinji was in the first episode where Sachiel attacked, I, just as he had, saw Rei in the distance, and then I may have awoke, I can't recall the rest.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:18 pm i'm pretty sure i've had a couple...just cant remember the details...all had to do with nerv though...

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:18 pm I had a dream that I was watching Eva... Then I woke up and read the manga. That's as close as I get.

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:20 pm I had a dream that I had a very long conversation with Rei however I couldn't see her but it was her voice (the english speaking voice actor, I don't speak Japanese) and in the dream I knew it was her. It's actually a repeating dream although I don't have it as often as I do other repeating dreams.

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Mon Jul 12, 2004 4:22 pm nope, never

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Mon Jul 12, 2004 5:31 pm Ive dreamed of being Karwou in that final scene... then Shinji sqeazed... that was scary and man were Unit-01's hands cold!

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Mon Jul 12, 2004 5:47 pm I had a dream that I was Shinji and I was reliving EoE. This is no joke it's scary :shock: :( :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Mon Jul 12, 2004 5:47 pm I had one but I was just watching the series in my dream so my brain was just in rerun mode.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Jul 12, 2004 6:55 pm Esion wrote: I had a dream that I had a very long conversation with Rei however I couldn't see her but it was her voice (the english speaking voice actor, I don't speak Japanese) and in the dream I knew it was her. It's actually a repeating dream although I don't have it as often as I do other repeating dreams.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr.Guy » Mon Jul 12, 2004 7:59 pm I've had three... one of which I can't remember. The first one was right smack in the devouration (is that even a word!?) of Zeruel. I must've been one of the technicians or something... but I was getting all these cool views (sky, eye level). It seems a trend in all my dreams that I see in 3rd Person (and everyone's face besides those known to me are blurry). The second one must have come from Children of an Elder God. They have this creepy set of red eyes in one of the chapters (Rei's). And my whole dream was just looking at them as they steadily got closer and closer...

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Mon Jul 12, 2004 8:03 pm For those of you who haven't read the fic DO SO RIGHT NOW!! It is one the best ones I have ever read and you can find it here http://www.thekeep.org/~rpm/eva/coaeg.html edit* Heheheheheheh........ these look fermillier?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jul 12, 2004 10:40 pm Have I ever had a dream about Eva? No. Thank god. :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by houtaru » Mon Jul 12, 2004 10:40 pm I did dream one night that I was in a crowded movie theater ready to watch some boring comedy and one of the previews I saw was for the Eva live action movie. I remember being so psyched for it. I was even dissapointed when I woke up.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Tue Jul 13, 2004 12:56 am Dont worry it only about 2.5 years away :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by quatre1453 » Tue Jul 13, 2004 1:08 am i have but it was more of a nightmare i was gendo and got what i had comming to me yumie

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Tue Jul 13, 2004 1:21 am I've never had an Eva related dream. In fact I don't dream very much at all. Or maybe I just don't remember them.

[]:             Quote Post by houtaru » Tue Jul 13, 2004 3:07 am Timesplitter 01 wrote: Dont worry it only about 2.5 years away :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Jul 13, 2004 3:41 am do your dreams have anime worlds or real worlds...? do wet dreams count? jk

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Tue Jul 13, 2004 4:35 am Dave wrote: Esion wrote: I had a dream that I had a very long conversation with Rei however I couldn't see her but it was her voice (the english speaking voice actor, I don't speak Japanese) and in the dream I knew it was her. It's actually a repeating dream although I don't have it as often as I do other repeating dreams.

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Tue Jul 13, 2004 5:26 am I can't really remember having any Eva related dreams... But i do day-dream a lot about Eva.
